underlying_goal: Translate SuperCollider ambient music patches (airports.scd) into the user's custom iOS synth app preset/pattern JSON format, with faithful sound design and note generation
friction_detail: Claude repeatedly added unsupported 'name' fields to noiseSmoothStep payloads causing silent decode failures, and used non-standard envelope names that prevented AudioGate from opening.
brief_summary: User wanted to port SuperCollider ambient music patches to their iOS synth app's JSON format; Claude created multiple presets and a pattern file but introduced several silent-failure bugs that required debugging iterations.
